FaqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FaqPage.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about Mimoo.

whatIsMimoo.a:
Mimoo is a cozy platform to protect your valuables with QR codes. If your item is lost and someone finds it, they can scan the QR and contact you directly — all with privacy intact.

Mimoo isn't just a utility — we believe losing things is painful, and every reunion is a story worth celebrating. 💜

isItFree.a:
Yes! Mimoo is 100% free forever. No paid tiers, no hidden limits, no ads.

We believe protecting what matters should be accessible to all. If Mimoo helps you, you can support us through donations (optional).

howToRegister.a:
Sign-up is easy:
1. Click 'Sign up' in the top right
2. Enter your name, email, and password (or use Google)
3. Pick your favorite Mimoo character
4. Done! Create your first item right away

forgotPassword.q: I forgot my password, what should I do?
forgotPassword.a: Click 'Forgot Password?' on the login page, enter your email, and we'll send a magic link to reset. Check your inbox in 1-2 minutes.

deleteAccount.a:
Yes! For now, contact us at hello@mimoo.id to request account deletion. All your data (items, reports, profile) will be permanently deleted within 30 days.

We'll add a self-service button in the dashboard soon.

itemLimit.q: What's the max items I can create?
itemLimit.a: No limit! Create as many items as you need, free. Want to protect all your IDs, wallets, bags, laptops? Go ahead!

qrPrint.q: How do I print the QR code?
qrPrint.a:
1. Open your item detail in dashboard
2. Click 'Download QR (PNG)' — file downloads
3. Print from your computer or phone

Tips: For best results, print on sticker paper (stationery store) or stick to durable plastic card. Mimoo is planning quality physical cards — stay tuned!

scanCount.q: Why is my scan count rising even with no reports?
scanCount.a:
Scan count increases every time someone opens your item's recovery URL. This can happen because:
- Someone scanned the QR but didn't send a message
- Search engine bots (rare, our URLs aren't indexed)
- You yourself opening the URL to test

This is normal and actually good — it means your QR is visible & active.

lostModeWhat.a:
Lost Mode is a toggle on each item to mark that the item is currently lost. When active:
- Recovery page becomes more urgent (pink color, ⚠️ banner)
- Emergency contact (WhatsApp) appears for the finder to reach you directly
- You can offer a reward (optional)
- Every contact access is logged for anti-abuse

whatsappPrivacy.a:
Very safe! We use 3 layers of protection:
1. Number is AES-encrypted in database (not plaintext)
2. Never appears in HTML source — only shown when finder clicks 'Chat via WhatsApp'
3. Every access is logged (IP hashed, not raw) for anti-abuse audit

dataPrivacy.q: How does Mimoo protect my data?
dataPrivacy.a:
Privacy is Mimoo's core value:
- Email & password stored securely in Supabase (industry-standard)
- Emergency contacts AES-encrypted
- IP addresses hashed, not raw (audit log)
- Recovery URLs not indexed by Google
- Profile only shows name + avatar (no email/phone)
- No tracking pixels or invasive third-party analytics

donation.a:
If Mimoo helps you, you can:
- Donate via Trakteer/Saweria (coming soon)
- Share Mimoo with friends & family
- Send feedback to hello@mimoo.id
- Buy a Mimoo physical card (in planning!)

businessUse.q: Can Mimoo be used for offices/schools?
businessUse.a: Mimoo is currently personal-use, but we're planning B2B features (admin panel, bulk items, organization branding). If your office/school is interested, email us at hello@mimoo.id — we'd love to chat!

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.subtitle: How Mimoo protects your data — explained in human language.
PrivacyPage.intro: Mimoo is built with privacy as a foundational principle, not a checklist. This document explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights as a user.

tldr.title: 💜 TL;DR (Summary)
items: We ask for the minimum data needed
No ads, no selling data to third parties
You can request account & data deletion anytime
Recovery URLs not indexed by search engines

dataCollected.title: 1. Data We Collect
dataCollected.content:
When you use Mimoo, we collect:

**At sign-up:**
- Name (for profile & recovery page display)
- Email (for login & notifications)
- Password (hashed, we cannot see it)
- Avatar character preference

**While using Mimoo:**
- Items you create (name, category, message, recovery code)
- Item status (active/lost)
- Emergency WhatsApp contact (if Lost Mode active) — encrypted
- Reward description (optional)

**When someone scans your QR:**
- Finder's message
- Location (text + optional GPS)
- Finder info (if they fill it: name, contact)
- Finder's IP address (hashed, not raw)
- Browser user agent

We do **not** collect:
- Your location when not using Mimoo
- Your browsing history
- Contacts on your phone
- Photos or media without explicit upload

howWeUse.title: 2. How We Use Data
howWeUse.content:
Your data is used for:

- **Mimoo operations**: display your items, render recovery page, send email notifications
- **Security**: audit log for anti-abuse (who accessed emergency contact, when)
- **Communication**: transactional emails (finder reports, password reset) — no marketing spam
- **Improvement**: anonymous aggregate metrics (scan counts, reunion success rates) to improve the product

We will **not**:
- Sell or rent your data
- Share data with advertisers
- Use your data to train AI/ML models
- Access your account without permission (except emergency support, with consent)

encryption.title: 3. Encryption & Security
encryption.content:
Mimoo's security layers:

- **At-rest encryption**: Supabase database uses AES-256
- **Application-level encryption**: Emergency contacts (WhatsApp) AES-encrypted at app layer using crypto-js before saving to DB. If database leaked, contacts remain safe.
- **In-transit**: All connections use HTTPS/TLS 1.3
- **Password**: Hashed with bcrypt (industry standard)
- **Row Level Security (RLS)**: Users can only access their own data
- **IP hashing**: IP addresses hashed with SHA-256 before logging

Extra layers when Lost Mode is active:
- WhatsApp number never appears in HTML source
- Finder clicks button → state changes → click again to open wa.me link
- Every access logged in `contact_reveals` table with IP hash + user agent

thirdParty.title: 4. Third Parties
thirdParty.content:
Mimoo uses these third-party services:

- **Supabase** (database & auth) — Singapore data center (closest to Indonesia)
- **Resend** (email notifications) — for finder report alerts
- **Google OAuth** (if you choose Google login) — for authentication
- **Vercel** (hosting) — to serve the web app

Each provider has their own privacy policy that also protects your data. Mimoo chose providers with strong privacy track records.

yourRights.title: 5. Your Rights
yourRights.content:
You have the right to:

- **Access**: View all data Mimoo has about you (via dashboard)
- **Edit**: Update profile, avatar, items anytime
- **Delete**: Request account & data deletion (email hello@mimoo.id)
- **Export**: Request a copy of all your data in JSON (email us)
- **Withdraw**: Stop using Mimoo anytime, no consequences
- **Object**: Refuse certain data processing (contact us)

We respond within 7 business days.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies & Tracking
cookies.content:
Mimoo uses cookies only for:

- **Authentication**: session cookie to keep you logged in (essential)
- **Locale preference**: cookie to remember your language choice (essential)

We do **not** use:
- Tracking cookies for advertising
- Invasive third-party analytics (Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel)
- Behavioral tracking across multiple sites

children.title: 7. Underage Users
children.content:
Mimoo is open to all ages, but users under 13 must have parental supervision.

We don't knowingly collect data from children under 13 without parental consent. If you're a parent and find your child has signed up without consent, contact us to delete the account.

changes.title: 8. Policy Changes
changes.content:
If we update the privacy policy, we will:

- Update the date at the document header
- Send email notification for significant changes
- Show a banner in the app for 30 days

You can always re-review this document at /legal/privacy.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.content:
Privacy questions? Email us at:

**hello@mimoo.id**

We respond within 24 hours (business days). For urgent requests (data breach, etc.), prefix subject with [URGENT-PRIVACY].

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.subtitle: Rules for using Mimoo — written in language you can actually understand.
TermsPage.intro: By using Mimoo, you agree to the following terms. We've written them as clearly as possible so there are no hidden surprises.

tldr.title: 📝 TL;DR (Summary)
items: Mimoo is free with no hidden fees
You're responsible for items you register
Don't use it for illegal or harmful things
We provide service as-is, no 100% uptime guarantee
You can stop using Mimoo anytime

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content:
By registering or using Mimoo, you confirm:

- You are at least 13 years old (or have parental consent)
- You agree to all points in this document
- You agree to our Privacy Policy
- You will use Mimoo in compliance with Indonesian law

If you don't agree, please don't use Mimoo.

service.title: 2. About the Service
service.content:
Mimoo is a platform for:

- Protecting items with unique QR codes
- Facilitating reunions between owners and finders
- Providing public recovery pages per item
- Email notifications for finder reports

Mimoo is **not**:
- Insurance or item replacement
- Real-time GPS tracking
- An insurance company that will compensate lost items
- A detective service to locate items

We are a platform that facilitates reunions — items returning depends on kind-hearted finders.

account.title: 3. User Account
account.content:
You are responsible for:

- Keeping your password confidential
- Accuracy of information you provide
- Activities that happen on your account
- Notifying us immediately of unauthorized access

We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts that:
- Violate these terms
- Use Mimoo for illegal purposes
- Spam or abuse other users
- Inactive for more than 2 years

userContent.title: 4. User Content
userContent.content:
You retain ownership of content you upload (item names, custom messages, etc.). By uploading, you grant Mimoo a license to:

- Display your content on recovery pages
- Cache & serve content for performance
- Backup for disaster recovery

You **may not** upload content that:
- Violates Indonesian law
- Contains hate speech, racism, or discrimination
- Includes other people's contact info without consent
- Promotes unrelated products/services
- Is spam or scam

We reserve the right to remove violating content without notice.

lostMode.title: 5. Lost Mode & Emergency Contact
lostMode.content:
When activating Lost Mode, you agree:

- Your WhatsApp/contact will be visible to finders (via reveal button)
- Promised rewards are your obligation (if unfulfilled, finder can report)
- You are responsible for miscommunication with finders
- You won't abuse finders who act in good faith

If you're the owner of a lost item, please be kind to finders who took time to help.

intellectualProperty.title: 6. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content:
Mimoo (brand, logo, design, code) is ours. Mimoo characters (Denpa, Jaya, Salma, Kupa, etc.) are our original creations.

You **may**:
- Share Mimoo links with friends/family
- Mention Mimoo in reviews/social media
- Use Mimoo screenshots for testimonials

You **may not**:
- Copy Mimoo's design for similar products
- Use Mimoo logo/characters commercially without permission
- Reverse engineer Mimoo code

disclaimer.title: 7. Service Disclaimer
disclaimer.content:
Mimoo is provided **as-is**. We don't guarantee:

- 100% uptime (our target is 99.9%)
- Every lost item will be found
- Every finder will be honest and contact the owner
- Email notifications always deliver (depends on providers)

We are not liable for:
- Losses from items not returning
- Finder actions that harm you
- Reward-related fraud
- Data loss from disasters (but we always backup)

We always try our best, but please understand the service limitations.

termination.title: 8. Service Termination
termination.content:
You can stop using Mimoo anytime by:

- Deleting your account (request via hello@mimoo.id)
- Stopping use of the app (data persists until deleted)

We can terminate your account if:
- You repeatedly violate these terms
- Mimoo discontinues service (we'll notify 30 days in advance & give data export)

In termination cases, you have the right to request data export beforehand.

changes.title: 9. Terms Changes
changes.content:
We may update these terms at any time. For significant changes, we will:

- Email notification 30 days in advance
- Banner in the app
- Update date at document header

Continuing to use Mimoo after changes = agreement with new terms. If you don't agree, you can delete your account.

law.title: 10. Governing Law
law.content:
These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Indonesia.

If there's a dispute, we hope it can be resolved amicably via email (hello@mimoo.id). If not, disputes will be resolved at the Jakarta district court.

We pray this never happens 💜

contact.title: 11. Contact Us
contact.content:
Questions about terms? Email us:

**hello@mimoo.id**

We respond within 24 hours (business days).
